findings.description: The knowledge file describes the annotationMapping as "DBカラム名→アノテーション名のマッピング" (DB column name → annotation name mapping), but the source text explicitly states this feature matches against "特定のプロパティ名に合致するプロパティ" (properties matching specific property names). The concept of "DBカラム名" as the mapping key is not stated in the source; the source calls the keys "プロパティ名" (property names). This misrepresents what the annotationMapping keys represent, which is critical for correct configuration.
findings.source_evidence: 源文: 「特定のプロパティ名に合致するプロパティに対して、共通項目自動設定機能で使用するアノテーションを自動生成時に付与できる。」 — keys are referred to as プロパティ名, not DBカラム名
